Lobby_Start.text: {setState:scenePrefix,Lobby}{bg:JoyPolis}{showTextbox}{center}{color:lime}{blip:3}October 11, Time Unknown{nl}Inside Joypolis, Entrance

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: Hmm...{nl}Hmmmmmmmmmmm...

Lobby_Start.name: Phoenix
Lobby_Start.text: Detective Gumshoe.{nl}What's wrong?

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: I was thinking about the numbers{nl}on the padlock at the crime scene, pal.

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: Just what could those numbers{nl}possibly mean...?

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: I was scrutinizing the victim's notebook{nl}to solve that mystery, pal.

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: And I just found one thing{nl}that might be it, pal...

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: Oh, right. I wanted to consult{nl}with you about that too, pal, but...

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: There's something else important I need to talk about.{nl}Which one should I tell you first, pal?

Lobby_Start.name: Phoenix
Lobby_Start.text: The padlock mystery, and something important...{nl}Let's see...

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: Regarding the 4-digit number on the padlock,{nl}I think this memo in the notebook is highly suspicious, pal.

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: Alright, I'll read the memo, pal.

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: "If I make it the answer from the poster,{nl}I won't forget the 4-digit number."

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: Seems the victim was quite forgetful, pal.

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: Since the padlock requires a 4-digit input,{nl}I'm absolutely sure this memo is related, pal.

Lobby_Start.name: Phoenix
Lobby_Start.text: The answer from the poster, huh...

Lobby_Start.name: Phoenix
Lobby_Start.text: The padlock mystery, and something important...{nl}Let's see...

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: In a way, this is even more{nl}important than the padlock, pal.

Lobby_Start.name: Phoenix
Lobby_Start.text: What is it?

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: Actually...{nl}I got my hands on something really good today, pal.

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: This is it, pal.{nl}The 4th prize from the Ninja Nanja lottery!

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: I won it in a lottery at a candy store{nl}just a short walk from here, pal!

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: You don't know that candy store,{nl}do you, pal?

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: It's an old-fashioned candy store run by{nl}a grandma who seems pretty forgetful...

Lobby_Start.name: Phoenix
Lobby_Start.text: What does that{nl}have to do with the case?

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: It has nothing to do with the case, pal.{nl}I mean it's personally important to me.

Lobby_Start.name: Phoenix
Lobby_Start.text: (Wh-What the...)

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: But really, I didn't want the 4th prize.{nl}I wanted the grand prize, the "Last One Award", pal.

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: The Last One Award is a prize where{nl}the person who draws the last ticket in the store...

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: unconditionally gets a gold-plated{nl}Ninja Nanja figure, pal.

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: Aw, man...{nl}Just talking about it is bringing up all my frustration, pal...

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: Why didn't I make sure I had enough funds in my wallet back then...?

Lobby_Start.name: Phoenix
Lobby_Start.text: (Is this story... going to continue...?)

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: Actually...{nl}After I drew the 4th prize, the candy store grandma told me something, pal.

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: She said the next ticket was the last one,{nl}so I should just draw the rest of them.

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: Hearing those words, I shivered, pal.{nl}Because the next one being the last one meant...

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: If I drew that ticket, win or lose,{nl}I'd get the Last One Award!

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: In other words, I'd get my hands on{nl}the gold-plated Ninja Nanja!

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: The moment I realized that, I couldn't sit still.{nl}I eagerly took out my wallet, pal.

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: But...{nl}I didn't have any money left in my wallet...

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: So, after going to a convenience store ATM and coming back,{nl}the last ticket had already been drawn...

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: The grandma told me gently, pal.{nl}She said, "That's a shame."

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: I guess that was around 8 PM...{nl}I wept like a baby right there in the candy store, pal.

Lobby_Start.name: Gumshoe
Lobby_Start.text: Today is the anniversary of my defeat for the "Last One Award", pal!

Lobby_Start.name: Phoenix
Lobby_Start.text: (Alright, looks like the story's over.)

Lobby_Start.name: Phoenix
Lobby_Start.text: (I guess that's about it.)

Lobby_Start.name: Phoenix
Lobby_Start.text: (Once all the info is gathered, let's head to court.{nl}I'll reveal everything there!)
{setState:lobby_done,true}{hideTextbox}{stopBGM:true}{p:500}{hideCharacter}{fadeOutFg}{fadeBg:mayaMove}{playSound:jingle}{sectionEnd}{skip:0}
